_metadata.description: Local queue of publisher onboarding requests awaiting elder approval.

field_dictionary.requester_device_id: UUID - Anonymous device ID of the requesting publisher.
field_dictionary.requester_public_key: String - Base64 P-256 public key from the access_request lockbox.
field_dictionary.publisher_id: UUID (optional) - Pre-created publisher record this device is linking to (from invite).
field_dictionary.requested_at: ISO 8601 Date - When the request was received.
